case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LUIS TEOBALDO JIMENEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED NOV-01-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, LUIS TEOBALDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $25.00 SERVED NOV-01-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, LUIS TEOBALDO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: MARICRUZ CEDANO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, LUIS TEOBALDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, LUIS TEOBALDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
